name: School Bus Drivers Inc
registry_source: PA Department of State (pennsylvaniadb.com summary, entity # 2555488)
notes: PA business entity #2555488 incorporated 1993-11-22 at RD 1 Box 622B, Blairsville PA 15717 (matches input). No carrier record found in FMCSA SAFER for 'School Bus Drivers' or 'School Bus Drivers Inc'. NLRB case 06-RC-288857 lists 'Smith Bus Company and School Bus Drivers, Inc., a joint employer' - SBDI appears to act as a co-employer providing drivers/labor to Smith Bus Co (USDOT 364000, Blairsville PA, 231 power units / 202 drivers), which holds the operating authority. Therefore SBDI has no independent USDOT registration; fleet/operations sit under Smith Bus Co.
